title: CvObservation
description: Privacy-preserving CV telemetry message published from input-cv to audience-state via MQTT. ICD-2 contract. No images, frame URLs, face embeddings, or reversible biometric templates are permitted.

message_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this message. Used for deduplication under MQTT QoS 1.

produced_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp of observation window close.

camera_id.description: Stable camera identifier, unique within a site. Must match the camera_id in the input-cv source config.

pipeline_id.description: Identifier for the DeepStream pipeline instance that produced this observation.

frame_seq.description: Monotonically increasing frame sequence number per camera. Used by consumers to detect gaps and handle out-of-order delivery.

window_ms.description: Duration of the aggregation window this observation covers, in milliseconds.

counts.description: Per-window person count aggregates. Not per-identity tracking data.

present.description: Estimated number of persons present during the window.

confidence.description: Model confidence for the presence estimate, in range [0.0, 1.0].

demographics.description: Optional coarse aggregated demographic distributions. Must not contain per-person identifiers. All attributes are probabilistic bins only.

age_group.description: Distribution over coarse age bins. Values are probabilities summing to approximately 1.0.

gender.description: Coarse apparent-gender distribution over the observation window. Values are visual-appearance-based probabilities summing to approximately 1.0. Not identity or biometric data — aggregate probabilistic bins only.

attire.description: Coarse clothing-category distribution over the observation window. Values are visual-appearance-based probabilities. Not identity or biometric data — aggregate probabilistic bins only. Absent when attire CV model is not active. casual is strictly defined as clearly identifiable casual wear — not a catch-all.

dwell_estimate_ms.description: Estimated average dwell time for persons present during the window, in milliseconds.

suppressed.description: True if optional demographic attributes were suppressed due to low confidence gating.

attention.description: Gaze-toward-display probability over the observation window. Derived from head-pose estimation. Behavioral engagement metric — not demographic data. Not subject to demographics_suppressed gate. Absent when attention_camera_angle_validated=false or head-pose model is not active.

quality.description: Signal quality indicators for this observation window.

pipeline_degraded.description: True if the pipeline was in a degraded state during this window.

privacy.description: Hard contract flags. All must be false. Schema-enforced privacy boundary.
